home.title: The best ads don't look like ads.
home.subtitle: Brands that win in 2026 don't run ads anymore. They fund content. Adwaa is where that happens.
home.manifesto:
Traditional advertising didn't die dramatically.
It faded quietly, while everyone was looking elsewhere.
Creators kept making light anyway.
home.manifestoClosing: Real content. Finally paid what it's worth.
home.forInfluencersDesc: You were creating for free. That stops today. Adwaa connects you to brands that need your content. You set the rules. You deliver. You get paid.
home.forCompaniesDesc: Stop buying placements. Buy truth. Audiences trust the creators they chose. Work with them. Not around them.
home.forAdminDesc: The protocol that makes it all run. Verification, publishing, payments. The invisible infrastructure that makes everything possible.
home.trustedBy: For those who believe real content beats a paid ad
home.ctaFinal: Adwaa isn't for everyone. Only for those who believe real content beats a paid ad.
home.step1Title: They create content every day anyway.
home.step1Desc: Creators join Adwaa, set their terms and show what they do.
home.step2Title: Brands pick what looks like them.
home.step2Desc: Browse creators, find your voice, start a direct collaboration.
home.step3Desc: Content delivered, validated, payment processed. No friction.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.subtitle: Browse the latest campaigns. Log in as influencer to apply.

about.title: We built what Algeria was waiting for.
about.missionTitle: Not an agency. Not an ad network.
about.missionText: A direct protocol between those who create and those who need real content. Algerian talent has always existed. It just needed the infrastructure to step into the light.
about.whatWeDoText: Creators create. Brands need content. Adwaa handles everything in between — from connection to payment — so no one has to trust a stranger.
about.value1Title: Authenticity isn't a bonus. It's the product.
about.value1Text: Fabricated content fools no one anymore. We work exclusively with creators who have a real voice and a real audience.
about.value2Text: No unnecessary middlemen. Brands talk to creators. Creators deliver. The platform protects both.
about.value3Text: We built this for the Algerian market, with its realities, its audience and its creators. Not a copy of what exists elsewhere.
about.value4Text: Every creator is verified. Every payment is secured. Every delivery is documented.

contact.title: Talk to us.
contact.subtitle: No support ticket. No bot. Real people who reply.
contact.successMessage: We'll get back to you — not in 5 business days, as soon as we can.

faq.title: Straight questions. Straight answers.
faq.subtitle: No jargon. If something's unclear, that's on us.
faq.q1: How do I find a brand that matches what I do?
faq.a1: Log in as a creator, browse available brands and find the one that fits your content. Make sure your profile reflects what you actually create.
faq.a2: After delivering your content and getting brand validation, the Adwaa team processes payment. Transfers happen within 7 business days of confirmation.
faq.q3: How do I find creators that match our brand?
faq.a3: Register as a brand, browse available creators and start a direct collaboration. Each creator has a detailed profile with their content and audience.
faq.q4: What types of content can I create?
faq.a4: Adwaa supports all formats — posts, stories, reels, videos, TikTok, YouTube. Specific requirements are in each brief.
faq.a5: Brands and admins review profiles based on content, audience and relevance. A complete and verified profile increases your chances.
faq.q6: Is there a minimum follower count?
faq.a6: Each collaboration sets its own criteria. Some are open from 1,000 followers, others require more. Check each opportunity's details.
faq.q7: How do I update my profile?
faq.a7: Go to your dashboard and click 'Profile'. You can update your information at any time.
faq.a8: Payments are processed manually for now. Stripe Connect integration for automated payments is coming soon.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At UGC26, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.
privacy.section1Text: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, phone number, social media profiles, and payment information. We also automatically collect certain information about your device and usage of our platform.
privacy.section2Text: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, process transactions, send communications, and comply with legal obligations. We may also use your information to personalize your experience and show relevant campaigns.
privacy.section3Text: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information with campaign partners (companies) when you apply to their campaigns, service providers who assist in our operations, and as required by law.
privacy.section4Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. This includes encryption, secure servers, and regular security audits.
privacy.section5Text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can also object to processing, request data portability, and withdraw consent at any time. Contact us to exercise these rights.
privacy.section6Text: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. We do not use tracking cookies for advertising purposes.
privacy.section7Text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@ugc26.com.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to UGC26. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
terms.section1Text: By creating an account or using UGC26, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our platform.
terms.section2Text: You must provide accurate and complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities under your account. You must be at least 18 years old to use our platform.
terms.section3Text: Influencers who apply to campaigns agree to deliver content as specified in the campaign brief. Companies agree to provide clear campaign requirements and timely payment upon completion. UGC26 reserves the right to mediate disputes between parties.
terms.section4Text: All prices are displayed in Algerian Dinars (DZD). Payment processing is handled by UGC26. Influencers will receive payment after campaign completion is confirmed by the company and processed by the admin team.
terms.section5Text: Content created for campaigns is subject to the licensing terms specified in each campaign brief. By default, companies receive a license to use the content for marketing purposes. Influencers retain copyright unless otherwise agreed.
terms.section6Text: Users must not engage in fraudulent activity, create fake accounts, manipulate engagement metrics, share inappropriate content, or violate any applicable laws. Violation may result in account suspension or termination.
terms.section7Text: UGC26 is provided 'as is' without warranties. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.
terms.section8Text: We may update these terms from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes via email or platform notification. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.section9Text: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@ugc26.com.
